title: ShaderLab
description: Live GLSL shader editor with 6 preset scenes — fractals, raymarching, domain warp — plus sliders, PNG export, and localStorage saves.
concept: A WebGL fragment-shader playground aimed at developers who want to see GLSL in action without a build setup. Pick one of six presets (Mandelbrot, Julia, Raymarched World, Domain Warp FBM, Voronoi Mosaic, Plasma Waves), tweak parameters live with sliders, edit the GLSL directly in the built-in editor (Ctrl+Enter to apply), and export any frame as a high-res PNG. Pan/zoom with mouse drag and scroll wheel; all changes persist to localStorage.
features: 6 presets: Mandelbrot, Julia, Raymarched World, Domain Warp FBM, Voronoi Mosaic, Plasma Waves
Live GLSL code editor with error overlay — Ctrl+Enter to apply
Per-scene parameter sliders (iterations, warp strength, fog, palette, speed)
Mouse drag + scroll/pinch to pan/zoom fractals
Export any frame as timestamped PNG download
Save/load custom shaders per scene to localStorage
60 fps badge, keyboard shortcuts (1–6 to switch, Space to pause)

interaction.mouse: Drag to pan fractals; mouse position drives Julia c and scene-specific effects
interaction.touch: Drag to pan; pinch to zoom
interaction.keyboard: 1–6 switch scenes, Space pause, Ctrl+Enter apply shader
